how I get <Color=red>my trading<Color=white> done. I don't know

for it<Color=white>.

monsters caused, they all got washed out
to <Color=red>sea<Color=white>...
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Things that float away from our village
often wash up on <Color=red>Tenoko<Color=white>, an island off
the eastern coast. Maybe they're there.
<Color=red><unk[3:0:266]><Color=white>Of course, <Color=red>Tenoko Island<Color=white> is way out
to sea, and I don't have a boat...<unk[5:0]>to get
a boat.
Seems like I'm stuck, then. I'll never be
able to <Color=red>reopen my shop<Color=white>.

I sell some <Color=red>things you can find only here<Color=white>,
and my customers are eager to see me
get my shop up and running again...

that's all.
